docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SOLIMAN, HEBA AS TO DEFENDANT SOBCZYK, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLIMAN, HEBA AS TO DEFENDANT SOBCZYK, ALEX
ORDER RE:CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE DATE ON GREEN CARD, TODAY'S DATE USED AS SERVICE DATE SERVED DEC-06-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOBCZYK, ALEX

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-04-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $840.00 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. CHECK SHALL BE MAILED TODAY ON JANUARY 4, 2022. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEBRUARY 04, 2022, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF HEBA SOLIMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX SOBCZYK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF HEBA SOLIMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX SOBCZYK IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT SHE HAS RECIEVED PAYMENT FROM THE DEFENDANT AS AGREED TO AT THE LAST HEARING. PLAINTIFF IS INFORMED THAT THERE IS NO FURTHER ACTION TO BE TAKEN IN THIS MATTER AND THAT THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED BY COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
